tagline: The only senior care franchise where the franchisor funds caregiver payroll and manages back-office operations so owners can focus on growth
description_short: CareBuilders at Home is a full-time owner-operator senior care franchise that removes the biggest operational burdens by funding caregiver payroll and managing all billing, collections, and HR on the franchisee's behalf. Owners focus entirely on sales and community relationships in a recession-resistant sector where 10000 Baby Boomers turn 65 every day. With average unit revenue of $1.9M and an entry investment under $167K, the unit economics support a compelling investment case.
market_intelligence_insight: The non-medical home care market is growing at 7-10% annually through 2030 driven by 10000 Baby Boomers turning 65 daily and 9 in 10 seniors preferring to age in place; the broader home care services market is valued at $557.9B in 2025 and projected to reach $1.05T by 2035
item_19_headline: Average annual gross revenue of $1909010 across 22 reporting outlets for fiscal year ended September 30 2025
ongoing_support: payroll funding,billing and collections,HR support,weekly coaching calls,monthly webinars,field visits,refresher training
